title: scabiosa lucida subsp. lucida
intro: Scabiosa lucida subsp. lucida, commonly known as the glossy scabious or sweet scabious, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scabiosa lucida subsp. lucida include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Scabiosa lucida subsp. lucida often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the leaves, flowers, or roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
